response:
# Limerick for Dave the Programmer
There once was a coder named Dave,
Who cranked out code late in his cave.
He hunted that off-by-one bug,
And drowned it in his chipped coffee mug!
Now his code ships, and finally he’s saved!

This follows the classic AABBA limerick rhyme scheme, leans into relatable programmer tropes (the infamous off-by-one error, late-night debugging, chipped office mugs) and wraps with a satisfying, career-specific punchline.
